name: Alex Rivera
title: Full-Stack Engineer
tagline: I build thoughtful software that scales.
about: I'm a full-stack engineer with 5+ years of experience building products that people love. I specialize in React, Node.js, and distributed systems. When I'm not coding, I'm hiking trails or experimenting with new coffee brewing methods.

experience.description: Led migration of monolithic Rails app to microservices. Reduced p99 latency by 60%. Mentored a team of 4 engineers.
Built real-time collaboration features for a SaaS platform serving 50k users. Owned the entire frontend from scratch.
Delivered 20+ web projects for small businesses and agencies across e-commerce, marketing, and internal tools.

projects.name: OpenDesk
projects.description: An open-source project management tool built with React and Go. 2.3k GitHub stars. Real-time updates via WebSockets.

projects.name: CodeLens
projects.description: VS Code extension that uses AI to generate inline documentation. 10k+ installs from the marketplace.

projects.name: PriceWatch
projects.description: Browser extension that tracks price history on e-commerce sites and alerts users to drops.

projects.name: Logbook
projects.description: A minimalist journaling app with end-to-end encryption. Built in a weekend. 500+ users.
